content_body: Our cabin was exactly as portrayed online...stunning, comfortable and fun. We gathered our 2 adult kids and their significant others and slipped away to Blue Ridge into Hemlock Hideaway for the first time for 5 relaxing days. We will be coming back! It was refreshing to see the cabin was exactly as described online. This was the first time a kitchen really had utensils, spices and pans large enough for us to cook in! The views from any window was breathtaking and we could hear the creek below. We hiked, played boardgames and challenged each other endlessly in the game room with the fireplaces flickering in the background. We toasted marshmellows and made smores, drank hot chocolate and sat around talking as we put together a puzzle. The people of Blue Ridge were warm, conversive and I left not getting a chance to see all the quaint stores. We visited Helen and Vogel State Park and enjoyed the scenic drives. This cabin location was perfect for us. We felt secluded but were minutes away from a Walmart and the main town.
title: Exactly as Described Online!
